creator: bland@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey. Do you have a patch? Atm I have no hardware to verify arm64.
Also, I bet some header files has to be resynced with what is come along the latest Parallels product.

Anyway, you can give it a try with the line below commented in port's Makefile:
ONLY_FOR_ARCHS= amd64 i386

Please let me know if it works for you or not.
